title: b
description:
this is a play like you desire game. 

b freeflight experience: a newly created undulating meadow in spring / summer with a central big tree and day-night-cycle on every start is the playground of b -- a bumblebee of subgenus gaudium formosum, recognizable by their cheeky :p.

manual includednote: colliding with meadow is an option since update #18

day and night transitionselect your own mp3 or wav music file for day and night 

weather

vr supportoptional 

gameplaythis is a simple fly as a bumblebee around a big tree above a hilly grass field experience. 

It's being shared here for people other than I possibly enjoying this being able to do so.

previous versionsavailable from Steam game properties Beta branches

made withgame engine 

Unity

3rd party libraries, from Unity Asset Store

• DirectX 11 Grass Shader 

• Azure[Sky] Dynamic Skybox 

• NPR Paint Filter 

• Simple SSAO 

• Unity UI: OxOD Open/Save File Dialog System 

• uAudio: Mp3 Player/Streamer 

• Realistic Star 

• Dynamic Starry Sky 

• LowPoly Asteroids Pack 

• Mesh Effects 

• NVIDIA Ansel 

• Tri-ceratops

• FSR 3 - Upscaling for Unity

• GPU Instancer Pro

licensed music, from Shockwave-Sound

• day music: Days In the Sun -- Janis Johan Hynynen

• night music: From Night to Dawn -- Emmett Cooke (IMRO)

• accompanying audio: LYN074: Nature & Environments Set 3 -- Christos Panayides; LYN152: Ambient Environments -- Bjorn Lynne; Surround Ocean Surf

• to moon: Active -- Nicolas Major (SOCAN)

• at moon: Forgive Forget -- Wright, Alex (ASCAP - CAE#: 700329096)

• from moon: Our World -- Taylor, Jared Chance (ASCAP - IPI#: 719751517)

 

font

• M PLUS Rounded 1c, SIL OPEN FONT LICENSE Version 1.1 

nightsky texture

The Milky Way panorama -- ESO/S. Brunier; technically modified for scintillation and a cubemap; 

panorama to cubemap script -- Yutaka Yoshisaka

system requirements are a guideline, they are not guaranteed to be the only one or satisfying anyones criteria. Facing the center is particularly CPU-intensive and might decrease framerate.
description_short: play like you desire b free flight experience
